title: CommunityAlertLifecycleEvent
description: Payload published to Redis pub/sub channel 'community_alerts:lifecycle' on every alert state transition. Ephemeral; ES is the canonical store.

alert_id.description: Stable Alert.id. Use to look up canonical state in ES if payload is incomplete or ordering is ambiguous.

category.description: Convenience copy of Alert.category. Lets consumers route without re-fetch.

scope.description: Convenience copy of Alert.scope. Allows server-side filtering by community without re-fetch.

payload.description: Full Alert envelope at the moment of state change. Consumers MAY use directly; for strong consistency they SHOULD re-read ES.
